---
title: "Projects"
---

<div class="col-sm-6">

<a href="https://ivannadeanda.shinyapps.io/ile_dashboard/" class="project-link">

<div class="panel panel-default">

<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">Greenspace and Heat Exposure Dashboard</h3>
</div>

<div class="panel-body">
<p>My Master's thesis focused on characterizing the natural and built environments at different scales using high-resolution imagery and machine learning methods. This dashboard displays some of the results from my project.</p>
</div>

</div> <!-- panel -->

</a>

</div> <!-- col -->


<div class="col-sm-6">

<a href="https://github.com/ivannadeanda/data550-final" class="project-link">

<div class="panel panel-default">

<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">Fully Reproducible Code Pipeline</h3>
</div>

<div class="panel-body">
<p>This GitHub repository was created as a final project for DATA550. The repository can be forked and is meant to provide a fully reproducible code pipeline, including a Dockerhub Image for package standardization. </p>
</div>

</div> <!-- panel -->

</a>

</div> <!-- col -->
